records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my... So you're the one who saved our village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my... So you're the one who saved our village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my... So you're the one who saved our village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On behalf of everyone here... truly, thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On behalf of everyone here... truly, thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On behalf of everyone here... truly, thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh? H-haha... that's, uh, really embarrassing, I-I only came because they said to come, so don't... don't mind it too much...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh? H-haha... that's, uh, really embarrassing, I-I only came because they said to come, so don't... don't mind it too much...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh? H-haha... that's, uh, really embarrassing, I-I only came because they said to come, so don't... don't mind it too much...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mone's mama is here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mone's mama is here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mone's mama is here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this young-looking lady is a mom...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this young-looking lady is a mom...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this young-looking lady is a mom...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mama! Is the village all right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mama! Is the village all right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mama! Is the village all right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Veronica and the other mercenaries also helped so much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Veronica and the other mercenaries also helped so much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Veronica and the other mercenaries also helped so much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To think those same people once talked about driving us out...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To think those same people once talked about driving us out...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To think those same people once talked about driving us out...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I suppose that's life, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I suppose that's life, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I suppose that's life, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even back then, they were uncomfortable with chasing out villagers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even back then, they were uncomfortable with chasing out villagers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even back then, they were uncomfortable with chasing out villagers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe they said they'd come to <color=#ffd34c>repay a debt of the heart</color>, wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe they said they'd come to <color=#ffd34c>repay a debt of the heart</color>, wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe they said they'd come to <color=#ffd34c>repay a debt of the heart</color>, wasn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to them, we were able to head to the beach and clear out the C.O.s without worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to them, we were able to head to the beach and clear out the C.O.s without worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to them, we were able to head to the beach and clear out the C.O.s without worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though... without the Chief Maid, we wouldn't have felt completely safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though... without the Chief Maid, we wouldn't have felt completely safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though... without the Chief Maid, we wouldn't have felt completely safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was only providing covering fire from behind, Lily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was only providing covering fire from behind, Lily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was only providing covering fire from behind, Lily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Clearing out the C.O.s attacking the village was entirely the mercenaries' achievement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Clearing out the C.O.s attacking the village was entirely the mercenaries' achievement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Clearing out the C.O.s attacking the village was entirely the mercenaries' achievement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Says the woman who pierced a C.O.'s core with one bullet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Says the woman who pierced a C.O.'s core with one bullet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Says the woman who pierced a C.O.'s core with one bullet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, tin can. Are those people... actually safe?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, tin can. Are those people... actually safe?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, tin can. Are those people... actually safe?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Asking me won't
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Asking me won't
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Asking me won't
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rest assured, Miss Kiera.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rest assured, Miss Kiera.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rest assured, Miss Kiera.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Master we Flora Maids serve is the one you call the Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Master we Flora Maids serve is the one you call the Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Master we Flora Maids serve is the one you call the Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: His will is our will. You may trust us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: His will is our will. You may trust us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: His will is our will. You may trust us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right... you saved people, so I'll believe you're not the enemy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right... you saved people, so I'll believe you're not the enemy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right... you saved people, so I'll believe you're not the enemy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why aren't you leaving the island?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why aren't you leaving the island?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why aren't you leaving the island?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sea is chaos right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sea is chaos right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sea is chaos right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Front Bay's choking under waves of C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Front Bay's choking under waves of C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Front Bay's choking under waves of C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To the point they let a high-risk criminal like me walk out on a judicial deal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To the point they let a high-risk criminal like me walk out on a judicial deal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To the point they let a high-risk criminal like me walk out on a judicial deal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anything, it shows just how much they wanted to protect their home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anything, it shows just how much they wanted to protect their home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anything, it shows just how much they wanted to protect their home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there really something worth protecting, even at the cost of people's lives and their freedom?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there really something worth protecting, even at the cost of people's lives and their freedom?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there really something worth protecting, even at the cost of people's lives and their freedom?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A home is just a home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A home is just a home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A home is just a home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera... were you born and raised here in Front Bay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera... were you born and raised here in Front Bay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera... were you born and raised here in Front Bay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I don't know who my parents are, but I was born and raised in Front Bay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I don't know who my parents are, but I was born and raised in Front Bay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I don't know who my parents are, but I was born and raised in Front Bay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've watched people live with their right to sail freely stripped away by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've watched people live with their right to sail freely stripped away by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've watched people live with their right to sail freely stripped away by the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some lost their jobs. Some became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some lost their jobs. Some became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some lost their jobs. Some became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the Administration brought in outsiders to control everyone, which only made people more divided.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the Administration brought in outsiders to control everyone, which only made people more divided.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the Administration brought in outsiders to control everyone, which only made people more divided.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I want to take my home back from them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I want to take my home back from them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I want to take my home back from them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing more, nothing less.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing more, nothing less.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing more, nothing less.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Life is more precious than anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Life is more precious than anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Life is more precious than anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Kiera.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Kiera.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Kiera.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sometimes people act in ways that defy reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sometimes people act in ways that defy reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sometimes people act in ways that defy reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like the home I worked my whole life to build,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like the home I worked my whole life to build,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like the home I worked my whole life to build,

records.m_Talk_ENG: the hometown that holds every memory of my childhood...
records.m_Talk_DEU: the hometown that holds every memory of my childhood...
records.m_Talk_FRA: the hometown that holds every memory of my childhood...

records.m_Talk_ENG: or even just the feel of this place, its scent, its voices... Some people give up their freedom for things like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: or even just the feel of this place, its scent, its voices... Some people give up their freedom for things like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: or even just the feel of this place, its scent, its voices... Some people give up their freedom for things like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like the Avery Pirates did...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like the Avery Pirates did...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like the Avery Pirates did...

records.m_Talk_ENG: when they saved our island twenty years ago, during the Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: when they saved our island twenty years ago, during the Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: when they saved our island twenty years ago, during the Black Flood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Avery Pirates came all the way out here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Avery Pirates came all the way out here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Avery Pirates came all the way out here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They did. They were truly wonderful people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They did. They were truly wonderful people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They did. They were truly wonderful people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The words, "To show tomorrow to those who only live in the moment," I still remember clearly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The words, "To show tomorrow to those who only live in the moment," I still remember clearly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The words, "To show tomorrow to those who only live in the moment," I still remember clearly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To show tomorrow... to those who only live in the moment...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To show tomorrow... to those who only live in the moment...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To show tomorrow... to those who only live in the moment...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't... really get it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't... really get it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't... really get it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is nothing wrong with not knowing, Miss Kiera.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is nothing wrong with not knowing, Miss Kiera.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is nothing wrong with not knowing, Miss Kiera.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, too... wandered aimlessly until I found the one I wished to serve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, too... wandered aimlessly until I found the one I wished to serve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, too... wandered aimlessly until I found the one I wished to serve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when I met Master...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when I met Master...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when I met Master...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understood what Miss Moena meant by <color=#ffd34c>actions beyond understanding.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understood what Miss Moena meant by <color=#ffd34c>actions beyond understanding.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understood what Miss Moena meant by <color=#ffd34c>actions beyond understanding.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because you only look at him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because you only look at him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because you only look at him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, perhaps.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, perhaps.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, perhaps.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Attention toward one's master is a maid's essential virtue, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Attention toward one's master is a maid's essential virtue, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Attention toward one's master is a maid's essential virtue, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because he accepted you while you were lost?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because he accepted you while you were lost?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because he accepted you while you were lost?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That, too. He gave me a place to rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That, too. He gave me a place to rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That, too. He gave me a place to rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And more than anything...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And more than anything...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And more than anything...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He told me he would wait for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He told me he would wait for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He told me he would wait for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Auntie Mary... why don't I have parents?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Auntie Mary... why don't I have parents?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Auntie Mary... why don't I have parents?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Your parents left on a long journey to save Front Bay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Your parents left on a long journey to save Front Bay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Your parents left on a long journey to save Front Bay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A monster called Kraken sleeps beneath our waters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A monster called Kraken sleeps beneath our waters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A monster called Kraken sleeps beneath our waters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whenever it wakes and thrashes, the Black Flood destroys our home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whenever it wakes and thrashes, the Black Flood destroys our home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whenever it wakes and thrashes, the Black Flood destroys our home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So your parents are singing it a lullaby so it can sleep soundly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So your parents are singing it a lullaby so it can sleep soundly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So your parents are singing it a lullaby so it can sleep soundly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aww... They could've taken me, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aww... They could've taken me, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aww... They could've taken me, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I were better at singing, maybe they would've taken me along?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I were better at singing, maybe they would've taken me along?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I were better at singing, maybe they would've taken me along?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu. That place is full of scary monsters besides Kraken. Much too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu. That place is full of scary monsters besides Kraken. Much too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu. That place is full of scary monsters besides Kraken. Much too dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... how do I make them come back to see me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... how do I make them come back to see me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... how do I make them come back to see me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Front Bay becomes safe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Front Bay becomes safe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Front Bay becomes safe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the sea stops being dangerous, and anyone can go freely...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the sea stops being dangerous, and anyone can go freely...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the sea stops being dangerous, and anyone can go freely...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. By then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. By then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. By then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll be able to face them properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll be able to face them properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll be able to face them properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A white lie, of course. But one that became my only goal, my only direction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A white lie, of course. But one that became my only goal, my only direction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A white lie, of course. But one that became my only goal, my only direction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I could grow strong enough to bring lasting peace to Front Bay, maybe my parents would return.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I could grow strong enough to bring lasting peace to Front Bay, maybe my parents would return.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I could grow strong enough to bring lasting peace to Front Bay, maybe my parents would return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For that tiny childhood dream, I worked and worked and worked.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For that tiny childhood dream, I worked and worked and worked.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For that tiny childhood dream, I worked and worked and worked.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But no one ever waited for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But no one ever waited for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But no one ever waited for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would someone... wait for someone like me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would someone... wait for someone like me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would someone... wait for someone like me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my... So you're the one who saved our village.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my... So you're the one who saved our village.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my... So you're the one who saved our village.

root.m_Talk_ENG: On behalf of everyone here... truly, thank you.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Is there really something worth protecting, even at the cost of people's lives and their freedom?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is there really something worth protecting, even at the cost of people's lives and their freedom?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A home is just a home.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A home is just a home.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A home is just a home.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera... were you born and raised here in Front Bay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera... were you born and raised here in Front Bay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera... were you born and raised here in Front Bay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I don't know who my parents are, but I was born and raised in Front Bay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I don't know who my parents are, but I was born and raised in Front Bay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I don't know who my parents are, but I was born and raised in Front Bay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've watched people live with their right to sail freely stripped away by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've watched people live with their right to sail freely stripped away by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've watched people live with their right to sail freely stripped away by the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some lost their jobs. Some became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some lost their jobs. Some became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some lost their jobs. Some became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the Administration brought in outsiders to control everyone, which only made people more divided.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the Administration brought in outsiders to control everyone, which only made people more divided.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the Administration brought in outsiders to control everyone, which only made people more divided.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I want to take my home back from them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I want to take my home back from them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I want to take my home back from them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing more, nothing less.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing more, nothing less.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing more, nothing less.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Life is more precious than anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Life is more precious than anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Life is more precious than anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Kiera.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Kiera.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Kiera.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sometimes people act in ways that defy reason.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sometimes people act in ways that defy reason.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sometimes people act in ways that defy reason.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like the home I worked my whole life to build,
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like the home I worked my whole life to build,
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like the home I worked my whole life to build,

root.m_Talk_ENG: the hometown that holds every memory of my childhood...
root.m_Talk_DEU: the hometown that holds every memory of my childhood...
root.m_Talk_FRA: the hometown that holds every memory of my childhood...

root.m_Talk_ENG: or even just the feel of this place, its scent, its voices... Some people give up their freedom for things like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: or even just the feel of this place, its scent, its voices... Some people give up their freedom for things like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: or even just the feel of this place, its scent, its voices... Some people give up their freedom for things like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like the Avery Pirates did...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like the Avery Pirates did...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like the Avery Pirates did...

root.m_Talk_ENG: when they saved our island twenty years ago, during the Black Flood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: when they saved our island twenty years ago, during the Black Flood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: when they saved our island twenty years ago, during the Black Flood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Avery Pirates came all the way out here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Avery Pirates came all the way out here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Avery Pirates came all the way out here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They did. They were truly wonderful people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They did. They were truly wonderful people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They did. They were truly wonderful people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The words, "To show tomorrow to those who only live in the moment," I still remember clearly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The words, "To show tomorrow to those who only live in the moment," I still remember clearly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The words, "To show tomorrow to those who only live in the moment," I still remember clearly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To show tomorrow... to those who only live in the moment...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To show tomorrow... to those who only live in the moment...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To show tomorrow... to those who only live in the moment...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't... really get it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't... really get it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't... really get it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is nothing wrong with not knowing, Miss Kiera.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is nothing wrong with not knowing, Miss Kiera.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is nothing wrong with not knowing, Miss Kiera.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I, too... wandered aimlessly until I found the one I wished to serve.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I, too... wandered aimlessly until I found the one I wished to serve.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I, too... wandered aimlessly until I found the one I wished to serve.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And when I met Master...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And when I met Master...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And when I met Master...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understood what Miss Moena meant by <color=#ffd34c>actions beyond understanding.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understood what Miss Moena meant by <color=#ffd34c>actions beyond understanding.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understood what Miss Moena meant by <color=#ffd34c>actions beyond understanding.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because you only look at him?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because you only look at him?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because you only look at him?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, perhaps.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, perhaps.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, perhaps.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Attention toward one's master is a maid's essential virtue, after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Attention toward one's master is a maid's essential virtue, after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Attention toward one's master is a maid's essential virtue, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because he accepted you while you were lost?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because he accepted you while you were lost?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because he accepted you while you were lost?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That, too. He gave me a place to rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That, too. He gave me a place to rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That, too. He gave me a place to rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And more than anything...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And more than anything...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And more than anything...

root.m_Talk_ENG: He told me he would wait for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He told me he would wait for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He told me he would wait for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Auntie Mary... why don't I have parents?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Auntie Mary... why don't I have parents?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Auntie Mary... why don't I have parents?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Your parents left on a long journey to save Front Bay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Your parents left on a long journey to save Front Bay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Your parents left on a long journey to save Front Bay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A monster called Kraken sleeps beneath our waters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A monster called Kraken sleeps beneath our waters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A monster called Kraken sleeps beneath our waters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whenever it wakes and thrashes, the Black Flood destroys our home.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whenever it wakes and thrashes, the Black Flood destroys our home.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whenever it wakes and thrashes, the Black Flood destroys our home.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So your parents are singing it a lullaby so it can sleep soundly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So your parents are singing it a lullaby so it can sleep soundly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So your parents are singing it a lullaby so it can sleep soundly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aww... They could've taken me, too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aww... They could've taken me, too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aww... They could've taken me, too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I were better at singing, maybe they would've taken me along?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I were better at singing, maybe they would've taken me along?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I were better at singing, maybe they would've taken me along?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu. That place is full of scary monsters besides Kraken. Much too dangerous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu. That place is full of scary monsters besides Kraken. Much too dangerous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu. That place is full of scary monsters besides Kraken. Much too dangerous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... how do I make them come back to see me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... how do I make them come back to see me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... how do I make them come back to see me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Front Bay becomes safe...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Front Bay becomes safe...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Front Bay becomes safe...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the sea stops being dangerous, and anyone can go freely...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the sea stops being dangerous, and anyone can go freely...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the sea stops being dangerous, and anyone can go freely...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. By then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. By then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. By then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'll be able to face them properly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'll be able to face them properly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'll be able to face them properly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A white lie, of course. But one that became my only goal, my only direction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A white lie, of course. But one that became my only goal, my only direction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A white lie, of course. But one that became my only goal, my only direction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I could grow strong enough to bring lasting peace to Front Bay, maybe my parents would return.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I could grow strong enough to bring lasting peace to Front Bay, maybe my parents would return.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I could grow strong enough to bring lasting peace to Front Bay, maybe my parents would return.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For that tiny childhood dream, I worked and worked and worked.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For that tiny childhood dream, I worked and worked and worked.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For that tiny childhood dream, I worked and worked and worked.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But no one ever waited for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But no one ever waited for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But no one ever waited for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would someone... wait for someone like me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would someone... wait for someone like me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would someone... wait for someone like me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.
